subject: Cumulative and Survival Distribution Functions
question: Consider a random variable $X$ whose distribution function (cdf) is given by $F(x) = \begin{cases} 0 & x < -2 \\ 0.1 & -2\le x < 1.1 \\ 0.3 & 1.1\le x < 2 \\ 0.6 & 2\le x < 3 \\ 1 & x\ge 3 \end{cases}$ (a) Give the probability mass function, $\Pr(x)$, of $X$, explicitly. (b) Compute $\Pr(2 < X < 3)$. (c) Compute $\Pr(X\ge 3)$. (d) Compute $\Pr(X\ge 3 \mid X\ge 0)$.
